# VETT — llms.txt

> AI-powered market research platform. Generate synthetic respondent
> personas to your audience spec, simulate surveys in minutes, and get
> insights — without recruiting real panels.

## What VETT does

VETT is a market-research platform that uses AI to generate synthetic
respondents matching a target audience specification (geography,
demographics, psychographics, B2B filters), then simulates each
respondent's answers to a survey designed by the user. Reports
include executive summaries, per-question distributions, cross-cut
segmentation, attention/emotion analysis for creatives, and
exportable PDF / PowerPoint / Excel deliverables.

The core promise: "you set the number, we deliver it." Every
respondent is generated to match the user's screener spec, not
filtered against it. No panel recruitment, no fallback, no refunds
needed.

## Pricing (per mission, no subscription)

VETT runs three goal-keyed pricing ladders:

- Validate / naming / marketing missions (per-respondent):
  - Sniff Test    5 personas    $9
  - Validate     10 personas    $35
  - Confidence   50 personas    $99
  - Deep Dive   250 personas    $299
  - Scale      1000 personas    $899
  - Enterprise 5000 personas  $1990

- Brand Lift missions (statistical sample sizes):
  - Pulse       50 personas    $99
  - Tracker    200 personas    $299
  - Wave       500 personas    $599
  - Enterprise 2000 personas  $1499

- Creative Attention (flat per-asset):
  - Image       1 image  $19
  - Video       1 video  $39
  - Bundle      5 assets $79
  - Series     20 assets $249

## Goal types supported

- validate — product validation, pricing research, feature roadmap
- naming_messaging — naming testing, messaging clarity
- marketing — creative + ad testing, campaign concepts
- creative_attention — image/video frame-by-frame attention/emotion
  analysis with the goal_type-keyed Creative Attention pipeline
- brand_lift — pre/post brand awareness/recall/sentiment/intent
  using the 9-category Happydemics framework (brand_recall_unaided,
  brand_recall_aided, brand_attribution, brand_awareness,
  message_association, brand_favorability, purchase_intent,
  recommendation_intent, ad_recall)

## How it works

1. User describes the research question in plain language.
2. AI clarifies the brief (3 quick questions), builds a survey with
   appropriate question types, and suggests targeting.
3. AI generates personas matching the targeting + screener spec,
   simulates each persona's answers, and synthesizes insights.
4. User receives an executive summary, per-question distributions
   with confidence intervals, cross-cut segmentation, and a downloadable
   PDF/PPT/CSV report.

Mission turnaround: 5-15 minutes typical, scaling with respondent count.

## Markets

VETT supports research in 150+ markets globally. Strong coverage
in MENA (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Lebanon, Jordan), GCC, Europe
(UK, Germany, France, Spain), North America (US, Canada), India,
Singapore, Brazil, and emerging markets.
